environment_hash.source: phase_id + project sha + active-context sha + selected interpreter metadata

normalized_timestamp_policy: Replace wall-clock output with phase_date plus deterministic event slots.
allowed_nondeterminism: semantic commentary only when paired with deterministic artifacts
replay_equivalence_rule: A replay is equivalent only when input_hash, fixture_hash, environment_hash, policy decisions, authorization outcomes, and cost counters match within declared nondeterminism.
